name: git-branches-panel
description: Tree view for local and remote Git branches, stashes, worktrees, and tags with grouping, sync state, and quick actions.

commands.title: New Branch from Selected Branch and Checkout...
Show Stashed Changes vs Current Branch
Prune Local Branches with Missing Upstream

gitBranchesPanel.groupByFolder.description: Group branches by folder prefix (for example, feature/my-branch goes into the feature folder).

gitBranchesPanel.normalizeNewBranchNames.description: Apply extra lowercase kebab-case normalization to new branch names after the extension first sanitizes them into valid Git branch names, stripping special characters other than `-` while preserving folder separators (`/`).

gitBranchesPanel.newBranchPrefixes.description: Optional branch-name prefixes to offer before the new branch input opens. Use an empty array to skip the prefix picker.

gitBranchesPanel.protectedBranchNames.description: Branch names to protect from delete actions. Remote branches also honor the short branch name, so `main` protects `origin/main`.

gitBranchesPanel.branchContextMenu.prima.description: Ordered list of branch right-click actions to show before 'More Branch Actions...'. Remove action ids to hide them; the full fallback menu always remains available from 'More Branch Actions...'.

gitBranchesPanel.sortOrder.description: Sort branches alphabetically or by most recently updated commit.

gitBranchesPanel.tagSortOrder.description: Sort tags by newest version first, oldest version first, alphabetically, or by most recently updated commit. Version-aware sorting recognizes semver-like suffixes such as `v1.2.3` or `release/v1.2.3` and keeps non-version tags in name order after version tags.

gitBranchesPanel.showCurrentBranchInfo.description: Show the current branch summary above the branches tree views.

gitBranchesPanel.showStatusBarBranchActi.description: Deprecated. This setting no longer has any effect because the extension no longer contributes a status bar branch action.
gitBranchesPanel.showStatusBarBranchActi.deprecationMessage: Deprecated: the status bar branch action was removed in 1.6.0 because VS Code already shows the active branch. This setting no longer has any effect.

gitBranchesPanel.toolbar.showNewBranch.description: Show the New Branch quick action in the view toolbar.

gitBranchesPanel.toolbar.showStashSilent.description: Show the Stash all changes silently quick action in the extension Branches view toolbar.

gitBranchesPanel.changesView.showStashAl.description: Show the Stash all changes silently quick action in the built-in Changes view title bar.

gitBranchesPanel.changesView.showStashSt.description: Show the Stash staged changes silently quick action in the built-in Changes view title bar.

gitBranchesPanel.changesView.showStashAl.description: Show the Stash all changes quick action in the built-in Changes view title bar.

gitBranchesPanel.changesView.showStashSt.description: Show the Stash staged changes quick action in the built-in Changes view title bar.

gitBranchesPanel.toolbar.showCurrentBran.description: Show the Sync Current Branch or Publish Current Branch quick action in the view toolbar.

gitBranchesPanel.toolbar.showFetchAll.description: Show the Fetch All quick action in the view toolbar.

gitBranchesPanel.toolbar.showFetchAllPru.description: Show the Fetch All (Prune) quick action in the view toolbar.

gitBranchesPanel.toolbar.showRefresh.description: Show the Refresh quick action in the view toolbar.

gitBranchesPanel.toolbar.showAdvancedAct.description: Show the More Actions quick action in the view toolbar.

gitBranchesPanel.toolbar.showSettings.description: Show the Open Extension Settings quick action in the view toolbar.
